changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM system_role WHERE name LIKE 'TMMRD %' OR name LIKE 'Bioanalytical %' OR name LIKE 'GBD %' OR name LIKE 'Bioequivalence %'

changeSet.comment: Remove custom research lab RBAC implementation

delete.where: role LIKE 'TMMRD %' OR role LIKE 'Bioanalytical %' OR role LIKE 'GBD %' OR role LIKE 'Bioequivalence %'
role_id IN ( SELECT id FROM system_role WHERE name LIKE 'TMMRD %' OR name LIKE 'Bioanalytical %' OR name LIKE 'GBD %' OR name LIKE 'Bioequivalence %' )
system_role_id IN ( SELECT id FROM system_role WHERE name LIKE 'TMMRD %' OR name LIKE 'Bioanalytical %' OR name LIKE 'GBD %' OR name LIKE 'Bioequivalence %' )
name LIKE 'TMMRD %' OR name LIKE 'Bioanalytical %' OR name LIKE 'GBD %' OR name LIKE 'Bioequivalence %'

rollback.comment: No rollback needed - this is the rollback changeset

changeSet.author: mherman22
changeSet.comment: Remove permission_level column used exclusively by custom research lab roles.

changeSet.author: mherman22
changeSet.comment: Clean up orphaned role ID references in lab_roles table that cause login NullPointerException

rollback.comment: Cannot rollback - orphaned references should not be restored
